DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-08-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CELIA BONFIGLIO'S MOTION TO DEEM FACTS ADMITTED, THE COURT ADOPT ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO TIMELY OPPOSITION FILED. CCP 2033.280. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY BETWEEN PLAINTIFFS, IS GRANTED. CCP 2033.280(C) (SANCTIONS ARE "MANDATORY"). Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CELIA BONFIGLIO's Motion To Deem Facts Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopt its tentative ruling. The motion to deem admitted is GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. CCP 2033.280. The request for sanctions in the amount of $250, jointly and severally between plaintiffs, is granted. CCP 2033.280(c) (sanctions are "mandatory"). Sanction payable by November 3, 2020.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
